meaning: adj.刺一样的,刺人的,激烈的
examples: His cheeks were stinging from the icy wind.
My eyes were stinging from the smoke.
He was silenced by her stinging rebuke.
Then an injection of pace from Arshavin saw him test Hennessey with a stinging shot.
The omission from the board is a stinging rebuke for Mr. Bucksbaum in particular.
